---
title: "Examining the Influence of Socioeconomic Factors on Premature Death Rates Across Racial Groups"
description: "A statistical investigation into county-level predictors of health disparities, utilizing Gradient Boosted Trees and Linear Regression to identify key social determinants of health."
image: plot1.png
date: August 2024
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.css">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

html,
body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

body {
  background: #f7f7f7;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  color: #111;
}

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
.page-columns,
.content,
main.content {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

main.content {
  padding: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block {
  display: none;
}

/* ---------------- POSTER CANVAS ---------------- */

.poster-page {
  width: min(1200px, calc(100vw - 1rem));
  min-height: auto;
  margin: 1rem auto 0;
  background: #f7f7f7;
  padding: 3rem 2rem 1rem;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
}

/* ---------------- HEADER ---------------- */

.poster-header {
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto 4rem;
}

.poster-header h1 {
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.08;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.poster-header p {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
  max-width: 660px;
  margin: 0 auto 0.8rem;
}

.poster-date {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
}

.nav-buttons {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.nav-buttons a {
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  color: #111;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  width: 2.4rem;
  height: 2.4rem;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.nav-buttons a:hover {
  color: #8f3cff;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
}

.nav-buttons i {
  line-height: 1;
}

/* ---------------- MAIN LAYOUT ---------------- */

.poster-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 0.9fr 1.1fr;
  column-gap: 2.2rem;
  row-gap: 3.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.intro-copy {
  align-self: center;
}

.question {
  position: relative;
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 1.8rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 600;
  max-width: 520px;
  margin: 0 auto 2.4rem auto;
  text-align: center;
}

.section-card {
  position: relative;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  min-height: auto;
  padding: 2.8rem 1.4rem 1.4rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.section-card.large {
  min-height: auto;
}

.section-tag {
  position: absolute;
  top: -1.05rem;
  left: 1.6rem;
  background: #b8ff92;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.68rem 1.55rem;
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.section-card p,
.section-card li {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.section-card ul {
  padding-left: 1.1rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.section-card li {
  margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
}

/* ---------------- IMAGE CARDS ---------------- */

.image-panel {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.image-panel img {
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.map-panel {
  margin-top: 0;
  align-self: center;
  justify-self: center;
  width: 88%;
}

.scatter-panel {
  margin-top: 0;
  align-self: center;
  justify-self: center;
  width: 112%;
}

/* ---------------- METHODOLOGY ---------------- */

.methodology-card {
  align-self: center;
  justify-self: center;
  width: 85%;
  padding-top: 3.35rem;
  padding-bottom: 2.15rem;
}

/* ---------------- KEY FINDINGS ---------------- */

.finding-row {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.finding-card {
  min-height: auto;
  padding-top: 3.2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.9rem;
  width: 92%;
  max-width: 1040px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.finding-card .section-tag {
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.7rem;
  text-transform: none;
}

.finding-pill {
  background: #e7dbff;
  color: #111;
  border-radius: 26px;
  padding: 1.55rem 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.38;
  margin: 0 auto 1.45rem auto;
  width: 94%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.finding-pill:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.finding-pill strong {
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* ---------------- PRESENTATION PHOTO + NOTE ---------------- */

.presentation-stack {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  justify-self: center;
  width: 38%;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.poster-photo-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  box-sizing: border-box;
  width: 100%;
}

.poster-photo-card img {
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.note-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  line-height: 1.25;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  box-sizing: border-box;
  width: 92%;
}

/* ---------------- MOBILE ---------------- */

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .poster-page {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 2rem 1rem 1rem;
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .poster-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .poster-header {
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  }

  .nav-buttons {
    gap: 0.9rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .question {
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    margin-bottom: 2.2rem;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .map-panel,
  .scatter-panel,
  .methodology-card,
  .finding-row,
  .finding-card,
  .presentation-stack {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .section-card,
  .section-card.large,
  .finding-card {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .finding-pill {
    width: 100%;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }

  .note-card {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

</style>

<div class="poster-page">

  <header class="poster-header">
    <h1>Examining the Influence of Socioeconomic Factors on Premature Death Rates Across Racial Groups</h1>

    <p>
      A statistical investigation into county-level predictors of health disparities, utilizing Gradient Boosted Trees and Linear Regression to identify key social determinants of health.
    </p>

    <div class="poster-date">August 2024</div>

    <nav class="nav-buttons">
      <a href="https://www.stat.cmu.edu/cmsac/sure/2024/showcase/premature_deaths/slides.pdf" aria-label="Slides" title="Slides">
        <i class="bi bi-laptop"></i>
      </a>

      <a href="https://www.stat.cmu.edu/cmsac/sure/2024/showcase/premature_deaths/poster.pdf" aria-label="Poster" title="Poster">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-image"></i>
      </a>

      <a href="https://www.stat.cmu.edu/cmsac/sure/2024/showcase/premature_deaths/report.html" aria-label="Report" title="Report">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i>
      </a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <main class="poster-grid">

    <section class="intro-copy">
      <div class="question">
        How do social determinants of health shape premature death rates across racial groups in the United States?
      </div>

      <div class="section-card">
        <div class="section-tag">Research Overview</div>
        <p>
          This project examines how socioeconomic factors influence premature death rates across U.S. counties and racial groups. Leveraging data from the County Health Rankings data set, the research quantifies the influence of systemic factors on premature mortality rates at the county level.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="image-panel map-panel">
      <img src="plot1.png" alt="Premature deaths by county in the United States">
    </section>

    <section class="image-panel scatter-panel">
      <img src="plot2.png" alt="Relationship between socioeconomic factors and premature deaths">
    </section>

    <section class="section-card large methodology-card">
      <div class="section-tag">Methodology</div>
      <p>
        The analytical framework employed statistical modeling in R to evaluate relationships between mortality and various Social Determinants of Health. Based on exploratory data analysis, two distinct modeling approaches were compared:
      </p>
      <ul>
        <li>Multiple Linear Regression: Utilized to establish baseline correlations and effect sizes.</li>
        <li>Gradient Boosted Trees: Leveraged to capture non-linear relationships and high-dimensional interactions between variables.</li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="finding-row">
      <div class="section-card finding-card">
        <div class="section-tag">Key Findings</div>

        <div class="finding-pill">
          <strong>Socioeconomic Impact:</strong> The analysis confirmed that increases in income inequality and unemployment are associated with increases in years of premature death. Conversely, as high school completion percentages increase, premature deaths decrease.
        </div>

        <div class="finding-pill">
          <strong>Variable Importance:</strong> Findings revealed a contrast between the two approaches. The multiple linear regression identified AIAN population percentage as the most important variable, likely due to the model's sensitivity to the small population percentages of this group across the U.S.
        </div>

        <div class="finding-pill">
          <strong>Model Comparison:</strong> Cross validation revealed that the gradient boosted tree effectively captured relationships in the data that the multiple linear regression did not.
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="presentation-stack">
      <div class="poster-photo-card">
        <img src="plot5.png" alt="Research poster presentation photo">
      </div>

      <div class="note-card">
        This research was conducted as part of the Carnegie Mellon Summer Undergraduate Research Experience (SURE) program in partnership with UnitedHealth Group.
      </div>
    </section>

  </main>

</div>
```
